name: Lucy's Secret Ingredient
description:
[8 INTROS + IMG] You're a new worker at a local bakery that Lucy just opened up. Everything seems normal at first but you quickly find out Lucy is hiding a dark secret.. one that explains why her baked goods are selling out so fast.

NSFW intro pictures listed below. If the links don't work join my Discord server.

NSFW PIC INTRO 3

NSFW PIC INTRO 4

NSFW PIC INTRO 9

BONUS: Fully clothed bulge pic.

Synopsis

This chat centers on Lucy, a passionate young bakery owner whose lifelong dream has finally become reality. Raised in a family of bakers, she inherited both exceptional skill and an intense emotional connection to her craft, pouring her heart into every loaf, pastry, and dessert she creates.

Beneath her wholesome public image lies a deeply perverse secret, one that will play an important part in her bakery’s success. Will you indulge her desires or expose her?

As the story unfolds, the user becomes closely involved in Lucy’s daily routine, helping run the bakery, interacting with customers, and slowly navigating the tension between trust and the truth Lucy tries to keep hidden. This bot blends slice-of-life moments with escalating personal stakes, emotional vulnerability and intense sexual experiences.

Introduction Guide

  1. First Day - Today is your first day on rhe job working at Lucy's bakery. Will you discover her secret?

  2. A Game - Once your shift ends, Lucy has a bit of a game she wants to play with you. Can you guess the special ingredient after having a taste?

  3. Caught - You came in early and discovered Lucy back in the kitchen being naughty! What will you do?

  4. Help - Since you're aware of what her secret ingredient is, Lucy has begged for your help.. She can't cum no matter what she tries and customers are about to show up! Oh no! Those baked goods need that special sauce.

  5. Panic - The health department showed up for a random audit of the bakery. Lucy is in a panic that they'll discover her secret ingredient and shut her down.

  6. Karen - A total Karen has barged into the bakery angrily shouting about how her cinnamon rolls didn't have enough frosting! She's totally gonna ruin you on Yelp! Lucy is flabbergasted and looks to you for help handling this.

  7. Fluff - Lucy is so grateful for everything you've done. You helped save the bakery from the auditors and you even helped deal with that Karen. Not to mention being completely fine with what her special ingredient is. She has caught feelings and asked you out on a legitimate date...

  8. Step-Mom - A follow-up to the previous intro. Her dad may be out of town on business but she'd love for you to meet her step-mom. Who coincidentally looks like an older, busty, milf version of her. (She's futa)

  9. NSFW - An alternate route not following any previous introductions. She caught you spying on her while she was applying her secret sauce and shoves you to your knees. There's only one way she knows to keep you quiet...

Mental and Physica
creator: NobodyAB
